title: CIP-309 signature entry
description: A single optional record-level authorship signature: a CLOSED CBOR map `{cose_sign1, ? cose_key}`. `cose_sign1` (REQUIRED) is a COSE_Sign1 structure carried as a chunked byte-string array (oversized byte strings split into 1..64-byte chunks). `cose_key` (optional) is the signer's public COSE_Key, likewise chunked. STRUCTURAL only: COSE_Sign1 structural decode, the path-1/path-2 mutual exclusion, the SIG_PRIVATE_KEY_LEAKED guard, and signature cryptographic verification are domain-pass / verifier concerns. The map is closed: unknown keys are rejected. (Canonical CBOR map-key ordering places `cose_key` before `cose_sign1`; JSON property order is irrelevant.)
